name: infra-automation-platform
description: Production-ready Infrastructure Automation Platform using Terraform and GCP

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start: echo 'Run start:backend and start:frontend in separate terminals'
scripts.build:backend: npm run build --prefix backend 2>/dev/null || echo 'No build script for backend'
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
